category_sources: source_facts.description says Geometry Engine; official GEOS documentation describes GEOS as Geometry Engine Open Source and a C++ port of JTS.
display_name_sources: Official GEOS site and repository use the GEOS name; source_facts.name is geos.
docs_sources: Official libgeos.org Usage navigation links API Docs, C API Programming, C++ API Programming, Tools, Bindings, and FAQ; libgeos.org/doxygen is the generated API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GEOS GitHub README states the official Git repository is https://github.com/libgeos/geos.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists geos-config and geosop; official GEOS documentation describes C++ and C interfaces and geometry operations used by GIS projects.
